hero.title: Modern Office Furniture Solutions
hero.description: Leading manufacturer of ergonomic office chairs, modern desks, and complete workstation solutions. Transform your workplace with our premium furniture collection.
factory.title: Innovative and Exclusive Materials and Finishes
factory.description: Workspace creates a modern workplace with award-winning ST19 boards and innovative office furniture combining trendy materials and sleek design.
trust.title: Trusted By Leading Companies
cert.title: Award Winning Office Furniture
cert.description: Excellent products in the areas of product design, functionality, communication design, and concepts.
services.title: My Service
service1.title: Project Based Quoting
service1.description: Free Initial Budget Estimate to fully furnish your work space and estimate the total project cost, as well as evaluate saving opportunities.
service2.title: Space Management and Consultancy
service2.description: Ask for consultation for space management, project management, personalized planning, assessment budget development, purchasing and installation.
service3.title: Choose Color, Finishes & Sizes
service3.description: Providing hundreds of options to customize the size, color and finish of your office furniture to meet the requirements of every company and individual.
products.title: Featured Products
aboutUs.title: About us
aboutUs.description: WORKSPACE is a leading, Dubai-based manufacturer, designer and supplier of modern office furniture. Committed to provide workplace furniture that delivers great value by combining modern design, dependable quality and exceptional service.
